items.name: Titanium Robot Suit
items.description:
Heavy Reactor Mech Exosuit - Roblox Style Sci-Fi Avatar
Dominate the digital battlefield with this Heavy Reactor Mech Exosuit, a high-quality 3D rendered avatar designed with stylized Roblox proportions. This futuristic soldier features battle-worn dark metal armor with realistic scratch textures and weathering. Key details include a vibrant glowing cyan reactor core in the chest and intricate exposed wiring (red, blue, and yellow) that adds a raw, industrial aesthetic. Perfect for use as a game asset, concept art, or profile picture, this character comes on a transparent background for easy editing and compositing.
#RobloxAvatar #MechSuit #SciFiRobot #ReactorCore #Cyborg #3DRender #GameAsset #FuturisticSoldier #Exoskeleton

items.name: Patchwork Chore Jacket, Vest and Tuxedo Shirt
items.description: Highlighting Polo’s signature pattern play, this utilitarian-inspired chore jacket features a patchwork construction that combines plaid tweed and herringbone pieces. It’s accented by a wide-wale corduroy collar and our woven label at the left pocket. The menswear-inspired vest is carefully crafted with supple leather in a classic construction for season-spanning wear. Cut for a slim fit, it is tailored with welt pockets, slimming waist darts, and an adjustable back belt. Then, the timeless tuxedo elements, such as a pleated front bib and extended barrel cuffs, define this buttoned cotton shirt.

items.name: Dreamy Pastel Blouse [PBR]
items.description:
🌸 Soft, airy, and effortlessly charming! ☁️
This blouse features delicate pastel watercolor patterns across a silky white fabric, paired with ruffled shoulders and voluminous sleeves. Its whimsical, dreamy vibe makes it the perfect choice for fashion showcases, roleplay, or simply bringing a touch of elegance and cuteness to your Roblox avatar.
💡 Why You’ll Love It
Unique pastel watercolor pattern with soft, artistic tones
Puffy sleeves and ruffled details for extra flair
Perfect for casual fashion, roleplay, or fantasy builds
Enhanced with high-quality PBR textures for a realistic, silky finish
🔍 Keywords: blouse, pastel, dreamy, watercolor, fashion, stylish, elegant, cute, roleplay, outfit
✨ Float through Roblox in a blouse that feels like wearable art!
This model includes high-quality PBR textures.
